{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Imperial law
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Gladiators have the right under [[Imperial law]] to invite a member of the [[Order]] to give them death-rites on the night before a match.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
